description: Late accounts of some kind. Each line opens with a number, then the name of a person, then a number of months, then another number. The last two numbers multiplied yield the number on the right. E.g. "240 Yaʿaqov Raẓon. . . 2 months for 120." Other names are Mustafa, Portos, Shalom ben Naʿim, Menaḥem Qāzīz, ʿAmram b. Hīnī.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
